settings.heading: Partner with AIRA
settings.subheading: We work with creators who care about sleep, sport, and breath. Apply once, earn on every order.

settings.title: Wellness creators
settings.body: Sleep, recovery, breathwork, mindfulness — anyone helping their audience live better.

settings.title: Athletes
settings.body: Endurance, combat, lifting — nasal breathing is performance, not just sleep.

settings.title: Lifestyle voices
settings.body: Honest reviews and real product use over scripted ads.

settings.title: Commission
settings.body: On every sale through your link.

settings.title: Audience code
settings.body: A discount code your audience can use.

settings.title: Payouts
settings.body: Cleared monthly via bank transfer or PayPal.

settings.title: Apply
settings.body: Fill out the short form below — takes about two minutes.

settings.title: Get set up
settings.body: We send your kit, link, and code within five business days of approval.

settings.title: Earn
settings.body: Share honestly. Get paid monthly on every sale through your link.

settings.question: How is commission tracked?
settings.answer: Each approved partner gets a unique link. Sales are attributed via a 30-day cookie window.

settings.question: When do I get paid?
settings.answer: Net 30. Payouts run on the first business day of each month for the previous month's earnings.

settings.question: Is there a minimum follower count?
settings.answer: No hard minimum. We review every application on audience fit and authenticity, not raw numbers.

settings.question: Can I post negative reviews?
settings.answer: Yes — we'd rather have honest reviews than scripted ones. The product has to earn it.
